rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Gov't Code §2306.025, which governs board member terms for a state housing agency.
quote: Members of the board hold office for staggered terms of six years, with the terms of two or three members expiring on January 31 of each odd-numbered year.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns board member terms, unrelated to homestead exemption.
